case_title: GOLDEN PHOENIX, INC. FKA vs. WAGONER, LESLIE YVONNE

docket_entries.description: GOLDEN GATE FURNITURE VS WAGONER APPEARANCE: LORNA WALKER FOR PLTF; DEFT PRO PER #7 HON. LILLIAN K SING, RPT BELDON YEE, CLK G ESPINOCILLA CC FOR TRIAL W/O JURY. ALL PRESENT. SETTLED. JUDGMENT PUR TO STIP IN FAVOR OF PLAINTIFF AGAINST DEFT FOR $1340.65 PRIN $125 INTEREST AND $400 ATTNY FEES AND COSTS. JDMT STAYED PROVIDING DEFT PAYS $60/M STARTING NOV 1, 1993 AND EACH MONTH THEREAFTER. JDGMT DEEMED SATISFIED IF DEFT PAYS TOTAL OF $700. IF DEFT DEFAULTS, PLAINTIFF MAY APPLY EX PARTE FOR WRIT. PRIOR TO NOV 1, 1993, PLTF TO FIX OR REPLACE DAMAGED FURNITURE I.E. 2 DRESSERS AND 1 BOX SPRING.
COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $360.00 CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED, $785.95 INTEREST, $35.00 COSTS FILED BY PLAINTIFF GOLDEN PHOENIX, INC. FKA GOLDEN GATE FURNITURE INC. FDBA RAMM'S FURNITURE
